title: rubus fuscus var. insectifolius
intro: Rubus fuscus var. insectifolius, also known as the black thorn or insect-leaved blackthorn, is a variant of the blackthorn shrub, characterized by its dark green, lobed leaves that resemble insect wings. The medicinal properties of Rubus fuscus var. insectifolius include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Rubus fuscus var. insectifolius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
